name: Wails
description: Build desktop applications with Go and web technologies (JS/HTML/CSS). Native WebView, no Chromium bundled.

seo.title: Wails — No-code / Low-code App Builders
seo.meta_description: Wails: Build desktop applications with Go and web technologies (JS/HTML/CSS). Native WebView, no Chromium bundled.

when_to_use: Lightweight Go desktop app without bundling a Chromium runtime
Native macOS and Windows app built with Go and JavaScript UI
Cross-platform desktop tool with Go backend and React frontend
Electron alternative for a Go-based developer utility
Native webview-based GUI for a Go CLI tool with a web UI

pros: Go backend with web frontend, no Chromium
Cleaner developer experience than CGo alternatives
cons: WebView differences between OSes bite you
Smaller ecosystem than Tauri or Electron
Mobile support not the primary focus
Debugging renderer issues can be cross-OS hell
review.verdict: The right pick for Go devs shipping desktop apps with web UI, if you accept OS-WebView quirks.
review.best_for: Go developers building small-binary desktop tools with web-tech frontends
review.not_for: Teams needing identical rendering across OSes — use Electron for uniformity
